inline_comments.message:
Looks ok to me Saravanan, but need you to do a couple things previous to merging:

1.
Add equivalent pom.xml entries in policy/engine repo.   File:  policy/engine / packages/base/src/files/install/servers/brmsgw/dependency.json

Actually, I also seem missing entries for sdnc in the dependency.json above.   We need to open a ticket for it, or if you don't mind, if you can you add equivalent for both of them while you are touching the file?

2.
Along the same lines, although not critical, it's better to have an entry here in this file, for "sdnc", and "actor.sdnc" that are missing, if you don't mind to add them?

I already updated that for them:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/69919/
They don't need sdnc or actor.sdnc for their use case

Oh I see, I thought so, but I found this file in the policy/engine repo that doesn't have those entries:

https://git.onap.org/policy/engine/plain/BRMSGateway/dependency.json

So, there are two divergent copies of the same file, and probably, the one I pointed out above is useless and may be ok not to keep in sync with packages/base/src/files/install/servers/brmsgw/dependency.json ..    Messy repo.

Can you please go to Mike Mokry and ask which is the source of truth and if it can be cleaned up? I doubt it - as it seems one is for local testing while the other is for production release. 2 different environments.
Let's let this review go through.
use assertEquals instead of assertTrue/equals() (same comment below)
this is ok, but not sure the purpose of using a StringBuilder here instead of just a plain String
this is ok, but not sure the purpose of using a StringBuilder here instead of just a plain String

The correct file that needs to be updated for deployment is packages/base/src/files/install/servers/brmsgw/dependency.json, which it seems Pam already updated.

Pam is correct, https://git.onap.org/policy/engine/plain/BRMSGateway/dependency.json is used for local testing.
